name: form-next-demo
visual_summary: Form Next Demo is a reusable UI component for rendering a form with Next.js. It's suitable for situations where developers need to quickly prototype and deploy forms as part of a complex application. Use it when you need to integrate forms with Next.js routing and server-side rendering.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-next-demo
Description: Form Next Demo is a reusable UI component for rendering a form with Next.js. It's suitable for situations where developers need to quickly prototype and deploy forms as part of a complex application. Use it when you need to integrate forms with Next.js routing and server-side rendering.
Style: clean, modern
Interactions: fillable, submittable
Tags: form, next.js, server-side rendering, routing

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
